case_number: Constitutional petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1245 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 13.03.2025 Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< On 10.11.2022 Counsel for the petitioner was put on notice to satisfy the Court as to the maintainability of instant petition. Thereafter no efforts were made by the petitioner and his Counsel to get matter fixed in Court for its proceedings. The conduct of the petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that they are no more interested to proceed with the matter. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
